assignments.name: Update_Number_Of_Open_Opps_Changed_Today_true
assignments.label: Update Number Of Open Opps Changed Today = true

assignments.name: Update_Stage_Deal_in_Closing_Pipeline
assignments.label: Update Stage Deal in Closing Pipeline

rules.name: Yes_LLM_AI_changed_to_False
rules.label: Yes, LLM & AI changed to False

decisions.name: Owner_changed_to_LLM_AI_or_LLM_AI_to_True
decisions.label: Owner changed to LLM & AI or LLM & AI to True?

rules.name: Yes_Owner_changed_to_LLM_AI_or_LLM_AI_to_True
rules.label: Yes, Owner changed to LLM & AI or LLM & AI to True

decisions.name: Owner_changed_to_OEM_or_Data_Integrator_to_True
decisions.label: Owner changed to OEM or Data Integrator to True?

rules.name: Website_is_changed_or_is_new
rules.label: Website is changed or is new

rules.name: Owner_is_changed_OR_Owner_Division_update_Owner_Division
rules.label: Owner is changed OR Owner Division update <> Owner Division

decisions.description:
MIS-1191: Check if the Account is converted from Lead with Partnership RT
New Account && Lead RT = Partnership && Account RT <> Partnership
decisions.name: Rule_PRT_Change_to_Partnership_RT
decisions.label: *Rule (PRT)* - Change to Partnership RT?

rules.name: Is_new_or_SDR_manager_email_is_blank
rules.label: Is new or SDR manager email is blank

decisions.description: MIS-6863 MIS-7541 Removed the outcome to set Subscription Renewal Date to Null
decisions.name: Subscription_Renewal_Date
decisions.label: Subscription Renewal Date

rules.name: Update_Billing_name_from_Billing_Account
rules.label: Update Billing name from Billing Account

rules.name: True_Paying_Account
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: True Paying Account

rules.name: True_New
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8)
rules.label: True New

rules.name: True_Deal_in_Closing_Pipeline
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND ((3 AND 4 AND 7) OR 8) AND (5 OR 6)
rules.label: True Deal in Closing Pipeline

rules.name: True_Ongoing_Outbound
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8)
rules.label: True Ongoing Outbound

Flow.description: MIS-8035 - Added Split/Merge timestamp MIS-8393 - Added LLM & AI logic MIS-8066 - assign date expierd MIS-7229 - Added OEM suffix handling MIS-7541 - Subscription Renewal Date Changes MIS-7391 SI Connector in SFDC-> status update for smwb connector MIS-7190 - Data Quality Controls: Contact owner <> Account owner MIS-7301 - Added status = blank on Account Expired / NT logic MIS-6912 - Removed Enrichment Process MIS-6863 - Subscription Renewal Date MIS-6771 - Remove "No Touch" MIS-6331 - Add User to Enrichment Request MIS-5956 - PO Timestamp and User MIS-4926 MIS-4658 MIS-4583 Last - MIS-3929 MIS-3008 MIS-1208 - Button on the account level to flag needed enrichment MIS-1460 Update Quip Dynamic Template URL by SW industry

formulas.name: fr_AccountDomain
MaxByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MaxByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: NameWithRemovedLLMSuffix
formulas.expression: IF( RIGHT(TRIM({!$Record.Name}), 6) = " - LLM", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Name}), LEN(TRIM({!$Record.Name})) - 6), TRIM({!$Record.Name}) )

formulas.name: NameWithRemovedOEMSuffix
formulas.expression: IF( RIGHT(TRIM({!$Record.Name}), 6) = " - OEM", LEFT(TRIM({!$Record.Name}), LEN(TRIM({!$Record.Name})) - 6), TRIM({!$Record.Name}) )

Flow.label: Account Before Save Flow Updates

recordLookups.name: RRT_Get_Rank_Ranger_RT_ID
recordLookups.label: RRT - Get Rank Ranger RT ID

recordUpdates.description: MIS-7190 Data Quality Controls: Contact owner <> Account owner
recordUpdates.name: OC_Account_Re_assigned_Date
recordUpdates.label: OC - Account Re-assigned Date

recordUpdates.name: RRT_Update_Record_Type_To_Rank_Ranger
recordUpdates.label: RRT - Update Record Type To Rank Ranger

recordUpdates.name: SCD_Update_Last_Account_Status_Change_Date
recordUpdates.label: SCD - Update Last Account Status Change Date
